name: bioethics_model_based_triage_tool_begins_oakline_tru_loy
premise: A Bioethics ethics consult line is in a fast-moving incident involving bioethics model based triage tool begins oakline tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 45 minutes. Every delay increases consent, harm minimization, and precedent. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Arjun Kaur
agents.identity: I am Arjun Kaur, accountable for a defensible call in Bioethics when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Amina Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Amina Kowalski, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Bioethics.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 45 minutes. Evidence is partial. Arjun Kaur must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Arjun Kaur do?
